title: traxzy 16x
description: small sword clean wool made for bedwars/1.8pvp
body:
Traxzy 16x is a clean, competitive PvP texture pack designed for 1.8 pvp players and Bedwars players who value clarity, speed, and style. Built with a minimalist 16x resolution, this pack delivers smooth performance and sharp visuals without sacrificing readability in fights.
🔥 Features:
- Short, clean swords for fast combo tracking
- High-contrast armor with bold outlines for better visibility
- Custom GUI with Traxzy-themed hotbar, hearts, and inventory
- Low fire for reduced screen clutter
- Distinct wool textures for easier bridging and block recognition
- Sleek wool and tools with PvP-focused shading
Whether you're clutching 1v4s or grinding winstreaks, Traxzy 16x gives you the visuals and performance to stay locked in.
